ocr_findings.description: The step-by-step long division diagram (showing 701÷16 with remainders 13, 11, 2 and the conversion to 2BD) is replaced with img-0.jpeg reference. The surrounding explanatory text correctly describes the result, so no meaning is lost from the prose.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 10進数→16進数 and 16進数→10進数 conversion methods. All prose text, the LaTeX formula for 各桁の数字×16^n, and explanatory sentences are faithfully captured. The only omission is the visual long-division diagram, which is acceptable as figure-replacement behavior.
